candidate_definition_hints.text: Cross-platform library to create & extract archives, compress & decompress files, and walk virtual file systems across various formats

Introducing **mholt/archives** - a cross-platform, multi-format Go library for working with archives and compression formats with a unified API and as virtual file systems compatible with [`io/fs`](https://pkg.go.dev/io/fs).

candidate_glosses.text: Introducing **mholt/archives** - a cross-platform, multi-format Go library for working with archives and compression formats with a unified API and as virtual file systems compatible with [`io/fs`](https://pkg.go.dev/io/fs).
